name: OpenClaw iOS Screenshot Plugin
description: Accept authenticated screenshot uploads over HTTP and store them in the OpenClaw workspace.

authToken.label: Auth Token
authToken.help: Bearer token or X-OpenClaw-Token value required for uploads.

routePath.label: Route Path
routePath.help: HTTP path exposed by the OpenClaw gateway for screenshot uploads.

destinationDir.label: Workspace Folder
destinationDir.help: Relative directory inside ~/.openclaw/workspace where uploads are stored.

maxPayloadBytes.label: Max Payload Bytes
maxPayloadBytes.help: Maximum accepted request size for a single upload.

allowedMimeTypes.label: Allowed MIME Types
allowedMimeTypes.help: Image MIME types accepted by the upload endpoint.
